feat.name: Moray Eel Mount
feat.special: If you have the Elver Pet or Growing Eel Friend ancestry feats, you can choose to have that pet become your bonded animal. You don’t need to spend 7 days of downtime to bond with the eel, and you automatically succeed at the Nature check. You can then retrain those feats.
feat.text: You have either trained a giant moray eel since its hatching or have tamed one in the wild. You gain the Bonded Animal skill feat, even if you don't meet the prerequisites, to bond with a giant moray eel. When you Command this Animal while you are mounted on it to take a move action, you automatically succeed instead of needing to attempt a check.
